generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor of MABI MAX 100 robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox of MABI MAX 100 robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearPositionTransmitted, OutputPositionTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentMeasurementTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearPositionTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance OutputPositionTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentMeasurementTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position of the motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT_Enabler, Simulink_Enabler
]

instance GearPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position at the gearwheel input of cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearPositionTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT_Enabler, Simulink_Enabler
]

instance OutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position at the output of cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputPositionTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT_Enabler, Simulink_Enabler
]

instance CurrentMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current input to permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentMeasurementTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTT_Enabler, Simulink_Enabler
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Enabler
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Enabler
]

instance Simulink_Motor_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for permanent magnet synchronous motor behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Enabler
]

instance Simulink_Gearwheel_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for gearwheel behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Enabler
]

instance Simulink_Gearbox_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for cycloidal gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Enabler
]

instance AAS_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelRefinementService
]

instance SysML_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelRefinementService
]

instance Simulink_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelRefinementService
]

instance MQTT_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIK_840D_sl_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlAlgorithmAdjustment
]

instance DashboardVisualization_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for human decision support"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParameters, DeviationMetrics, ControlAlgorithmAdjustment
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of measured and simulated data traces in unified dashboard for human decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]

instance ModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model refinement process to improve robot motion accuracy based on friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelRefinement
]

instance FrictionModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Parameters of friction models used to adjust control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DeviationMetrics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metrics measuring deviation between simulated and measured data for friction analysis"
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of data traces providing human decision support"
]

instance ModelRefinement : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Refined models for improved robot motion accuracy"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of robot control algorithms based on friction model parameters and deviation metrics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with live data synchronization during robot operation, processing sensor data as it is generated to update friction models dynamically."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Passive digital shadow with one-way data flow from physical robot (via MQTT) to virtual system, where data traces are processed by simulation models and visualized in a dashboard for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, focusing on real-time friction analysis during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and varying operational conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data versus measured data to assess model accuracy; continuous refinement of friction models based on operational deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML modeling language standards."
]
